Title: Centella Night Cream
Subtitle: Night Renewal
Description: An intensive overnight formula designed to rejuvenate your skin while you sleep. Infused with Centella Asiatica, brightening complexes, and repair-focused botanicals, this night cream hydrates deeply, improves skin texture, and helps reveal a smoother, luminous, and refreshed complexion by morning.
Benefits: Boosts skin radiance for a naturally luminous glow
Provides 72-hour hydration with a moisture-locking formula
Supports collagen to improve skin firmness and elasticity
Helps fade dark spots, acne scars, and discoloration
Repairs and strengthens the skin barrier overnight
Delivers a soft, smooth, poreless finish by morning
Reduces the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles
Promotes a more even-toned, youthful-looking complexion over time
Application: After cleansing and toning, take a small amount of Centella Night Cream and gently massage it upward onto your face and neck, avoiding the eye area. Leave it on overnight to fully absorb and lock in hydration, allowing your skin to repair, restore, and wake up looking radiant and smooth. Consistency is key for optimal results.
Tricks: Apply a slightly thicker layer on dry areas to maximize overnight hydration
Combine with your serum for enhanced repair benefits
Use consistently to see a reduction in fine lines and dark spots

ImportantInfo.Headline: Wake Up to Refreshed, Radiant Skin.
ImportantInfo.GoodFor: All skin types, including dry and sensitive skin
ImportantInfo.FeelsLike: A rich, creamy formula that melts effortlessly into the skin
ImportantInfo.LooksLike: Smooth, plump, and poreless skin by morning
ImportantInfo.SmellsLike: Subtle, calming freshness for a relaxing nighttime routine

WhatsInside.Intro: Our formula is powered by advanced repair and brightening actives. Meet 2 of our favorites for overnight renewal.
WhatsInside.I1Desc: a calming botanical that helps repair the skin barrier, reduce redness, and support healthier, more resilient skin overnight
WhatsInside.I2Desc: a deep hydration system that helps retain moisture, prevent overnight dryness, and keep skin plump and smooth by morning
WhatsInside.Also: BRIGHTENING COMPLEX, COLLAGEN SUPPORT BLEND, SPOT-CORRECTIVE ACTIVES, LINE-REDUCING COMPLEX, BARRIER REPAIR ACTIVES, EVEN-TONE ENHANCERS

FAQs.Q: Can I use this night cream with my serum?
FAQs.A: Yes, applying serum before the night cream enhances hydration and repair benefits.

FAQs.Q: Is it suitable for oily skin at night?
FAQs.A: Absolutely, it hydrates without clogging pores or leaving a greasy residue.

FAQs.Q: How often should I use it?
FAQs.A: For optimal results, use every night as the final step in your evening routine.

FAQs.Q: Will it help with dull or uneven skin tone?
FAQs.A: Yes, its brightening and repair ingredients work overnight to improve radiance and evenness.

FAQs.Q: Can it reduce the appearance of fine lines?
FAQs.A: Yes, regular use helps visibly minimize fine lines and promotes firmer, youthful-looking skin.

Title: Centella Face Wash
Subtitle: Pure Start
Description: A gentle, glow-reviving cleanser infused with Centella Asiatica, brightening actives, and hydrating botanicals to cleanse, soothe, and refresh your skin for a soft, balanced, and radiant look every day.
Benefits: Gently removes dirt, oil, and impurities without stripping the skin
Helps brighten complexion and revive dull, tired-looking skin
Supports hydration for a soft, fresh, and balanced feel
Calms irritation and reduces the look of redness
Helps maintain a healthy skin barrier for daily protection
Application: After wetting your face, take a small amount of Centella Face Wash and gently massage onto skin in circular motions for about 60 seconds. Rinse thoroughly with water and pat dry, then follow with your skincare routine.
Tricks: Use lukewarm water to avoid drying out your skin while cleansing
Massage gently for a full 60 seconds to allow ingredients to work effectively
Follow immediately with serum or moisturizer on damp skin to lock in hydration

FAQs.Q: Can I use this serum with other active ingredients?
FAQs.A: Yes, it layers well with most skincare actives. For stronger treatments like retinol, apply them separately and allow time before layering.

FAQs.A: Yes, the formula includes calming ingredients like Centella Asiatica and Aloe Vera, making it suitable for sensitive and acne-prone skin.

FAQs.Q: Can I use this serum both morning and night?
FAQs.A: Absolutely, it is designed for daily use and works effectively in both AM and PM routines.

FAQs.Q: Will it help with hyperpigmentation and acne marks?
FAQs.A: Yes, brightening ingredients like Niacinamide, Vitamin C, and Alpha Arbutin help visibly reduce dark spots and uneven tone over time.

FAQs.Q: Does it feel heavy or sticky on the skin?
FAQs.A: No, the formula is lightweight and fast-absorbing, leaving the skin smooth without any sticky residue.

Title: Elaris7 Tranexamic Brightening Serum
Subtitle: Even & Illuminate
Description: A targeted brightening serum designed to reduce the appearance of dark spots and uneven tone. It helps improve clarity, boost radiance, and support a smoother, more even-looking complexion with consistent use.
Benefits: Helps reduce the appearance of dark spots and discoloration
Supports a brighter, more even skin tone
Improves dullness and uneven texture
Enhances overall skin clarity and radiance
Hydrates while supporting the skin barrier
Helps smooth and refine the skin surface
Promotes a healthier, more luminous glow
Application: Use morning and night after cleansing and toning. Apply 2–3 drops to face and neck and gently press into the skin. Follow with moisturizer and use sunscreen during the day.
Tricks: Apply on slightly damp skin for better absorption
Use consistently for visible brightening results
Pair with sunscreen daily to prevent further discoloration
Layer with moisturizer to lock in hydration

ImportantInfo.Headline: Targeted Brightening That Works
ImportantInfo.Description: A serum for EVEN TONE + CLEAR, RADIANT SKIN.
ImportantInfo.GoodFor: All skin types, especially uneven tone and dark spots
ImportantInfo.FeelsLike: A smooth, fast-absorbing serum that layers easily
ImportantInfo.LooksLike: Brighter, clearer skin with improved tone
ImportantInfo.SmellsLike: A soft, clean scent with a subtle finish
ImportantInfo.FYI: Non-Greasy • Fast Absorbing • Daily Use • Tone-Correcting

WhatsInside.Intro: A potent brightening serum formulated to target dark spots, even skin tone, and enhance natural radiance.
WhatsInside.I1Desc: helps visibly reduce dark spots and discoloration
WhatsInside.I2Desc: supports even tone and improves dullness
WhatsInside.Also: Vitamin C, Alpha Arbutin, Hyaluronic Acid, Glycerin, Panthenol, Vitamin E, peptides, and botanical extracts for hydration, barrier support, and glowing skin

FAQs.Q: Can I use this serum every day?
FAQs.A: Yes, it is suitable for daily use, both morning and night.

FAQs.Q: Is it suitable for sensitive skin?
FAQs.A: Yes, it includes soothing ingredients, but patch testing is recommended.

FAQs.Q: Does it help with dark spots and pigmentation?
FAQs.A: Yes, it is designed to target discoloration and improve uneven tone.

FAQs.Q: Can I layer it with other skincare products?
FAQs.A: Yes, it works well with moisturizers, sunscreens, and other gentle actives.

FAQs.Q: Do I need to use sunscreen with this?
FAQs.A: Yes, sunscreen is essential during the day to protect and maintain results.

Title: Anti-Acne Serum

FAQs.Q: Will it dry out my skin?
FAQs.A: No, it contains soothing Aloe and Niacinamide to maintain moisture while fighting acne.

FAQs.Q: How often should I use it?
FAQs.A: Start once a day (evening) and work up to twice daily if your skin tolerates it well.

FAQs.Q: Can I use it with other serums?
FAQs.A: Yes, but avoid using it with highly acidic treatments at the same time.

Title: Oil-to-Foam Cleanser
Subtitle: Melt & Cleanse
Description: A transforming oil-to-foam cleanser designed to dissolve makeup, sunscreen, and daily buildup while maintaining skin balance and revealing a fresh, glass-like glow.
Benefits: Effortlessly melts away makeup and sunscreen buildup
Deeply cleanses without leaving skin dry or tight
Helps balance excess oil while maintaining hydration
Supports and strengthens the skin's natural barrier
Smooths texture and clears away daily impurities
Prepares skin for a clearer, more radiant appearance
Application: Apply 1–2 pumps of Oil-to-Foam Cleanser onto dry skin and gently massage to dissolve makeup and impurities. Add a little water to transform it into a soft foam, then rinse thoroughly before continuing your routine.
Tricks: Use on dry skin first to break down makeup more effectively
Add water gradually to activate the foam transformation
Massage gently for at least 60 seconds for a deeper cleanse
Follow with a face wash for a complete double-cleansing ritual
CatchyLine: Melt It Away. Cleanse It All.

ImportantInfo.Headline: Clean Skin Starts Here
ImportantInfo.GoodFor: All skin types, including oily and combination skin
ImportantInfo.FeelsLike: A silky oil that transforms into a soft, airy foam
ImportantInfo.LooksLike: Clean, refreshed skin with a smooth finish
ImportantInfo.SmellsLike: Gentle, fresh notes with a soothing touch

WhatsInside.Intro: A versatile oil-to-foam formula that dissolves impurities while keeping skin soft and balanced. Here are 2 key ingredients that make it so effective:
WhatsInside.I1Desc: rich, nourishing oils that break down makeup, sunscreen, and excess sebum without stripping the skin
WhatsInside.I2Desc: an antioxidant powerhouse that soothes and protects skin while maintaining hydration
WhatsInside.Also: Centella Asiatica, Glycerin, Mild Cleansing Agents

FAQs.Q: Can I use this cleanser daily?
FAQs.A: Yes, it is gentle enough for daily use and works well as the first step in your cleansing routine.

FAQs.Q: Do I still need a second cleanser after this?
FAQs.A: Yes, for a complete cleanse, it is recommended to follow with a face wash as part of double cleansing.

FAQs.Q: Is it suitable for oily or acne-prone skin?
FAQs.A: Yes, it helps remove excess oil and impurities without clogging pores or causing heaviness.

FAQs.Q: Will it remove waterproof makeup and sunscreen?
FAQs.A: Yes, the oil-based formula is designed to effectively dissolve long-wear makeup and SPF.

FAQs.Q: Does it leave any greasy residue after rinsing?
FAQs.A: No, it transforms into a foam and rinses clean, leaving skin fresh and balanced.

Title: Skin Refining Toner
Subtitle: Clarity Reset
Description: A refining toner designed to clarify, smooth, and rebalance the skin while enhancing radiance. It gently exfoliates, hydrates, and helps improve overall tone for a clearer, glass-like finish with continued use.
Benefits: Helps fade the appearance of spots and uneven tone
Clears pores and helps reduce future breakouts
Smooths texture through gentle exfoliation
Brightens dull skin for a more refined look
Maintains hydration while balancing the skin
Supports and soothes the skin barrier
Reveals a clearer, radiant, glass-like glow
Application: After cleansing, apply Skin Refining Toner using a cotton pad or gently press it into the skin with your hands. Allow it to absorb fully before applying serum and moisturizer.
Tricks: Use 2–3 times a week to avoid over-exfoliation
Apply with hands for a more hydrating effect
Focus on areas with texture or visible pores
Follow with serum immediately to enhance absorption

ImportantInfo.Headline: Clarity You Can See
ImportantInfo.GoodFor: All skin types, especially uneven and textured skin
ImportantInfo.FeelsLike: A refreshing, watery layer that absorbs quickly
ImportantInfo.LooksLike: Clearer, smoother skin with refined texture
ImportantInfo.SmellsLike: Clean, subtle freshness with a calming touch

WhatsInside.Intro: A gentle, clarifying toner that smooths, balances, and rehydrates skin. Here are 2 standout ingredients for refreshed, radiant skin:
WhatsInside.I1Desc: helps visibly improve skin tone, refine pores, and reduce the appearance of unevenness
WhatsInside.I2Desc: gently removes buildup and dead skin cells to reveal smoother, brighter skin

FAQs.Q: Can I use this toner every day?
FAQs.A: It is recommended to use it 2–3 times a week to avoid over-exfoliation while still seeing visible results.

FAQs.Q: Is this suitable for sensitive skin?
FAQs.A: Yes, it includes calming ingredients like Centella Asiatica to help soothe while refining the skin.

FAQs.Q: Will it help with acne and clogged pores?
FAQs.A: Yes, it helps clear pores and reduce buildup, which can minimize breakouts over time.

FAQs.Q: Can I use it with other active ingredients?
FAQs.A: Yes, but avoid layering with strong exfoliants on the same day to prevent irritation.

FAQs.Q: Does it dry out the skin?
FAQs.A: No, the formula is designed to maintain hydration while gently refining the skin.
